description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.


Fix
- fix: Fix the issue where the sync command does not remove the old master branch when replacing the master branch. by @DuckDuckStudio
Full Changelog: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1
